raw_response_text:
<features>
- Broad, radially symmetric petals with pink and white coloration
- Central cluster of stamens/pistils
- Petal shape is somewhat pointed but broad
- Lack of distinct drooping "falls" seen in yellow flowers
</features>
<kb>
- IF the flower has broad, radially symmetric petals with pink and white coloration and a central cluster of reproductive parts THEN class is 81
- IF the flower is yellow with distinct drooping outer petals (falls) and upright inner petals (standards) THEN class is 14
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The target image shows a flower with broad, pink and white petals arranged radially around a center. This matches the visual features of the examples labeled 81. It does not match the yellow, structurally distinct flowers labeled 14.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- Yellow petals with distinct dark markings on the lower petal (fall).
- Drooping lower petals and upright upper petals.
- Green leafy stem structure visible in the background.
</features>
<kb>
- IF the flower is yellow with drooping petals and dark markings on the lower petal THEN class is 14
- IF the flower is pink/white with radiating petals and a central cluster THEN class is 81
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The target image shows a yellow flower with drooping petals and dark markings on the large lower petal. This matches the visual pattern of the examples labeled '14' (yellow irises). It does not match the pink/white flower pattern of the examples labeled '81'.
</rule_check>

<response>14</response>
